page_content:
DANC148 Fundamentals of Modern Dance (2 Credits)

Introduction to modern dance with emphasis on the development of fundamental movement skills.

Restriction: Must not be in Dance program.

Repeatable to: 4 credits.

DANC149 Fundamentals of Modern Dance II (2 Credits)

Continuation of the development of axial and locomotor movement skills with emphasis on the development of functional alignment, musicality, range of movement, coordination, and movement memory.
